response.justification: Bogdan brings 15+ years of broad software engineering experience and recent hands-on work with Model Context Protocol tooling and agentic frameworks at re:cinq, which is genuinely relevant. However, the role requires 8+ years of production AI development — Bogdan's AI-specific work is confined entirely to his current role started April 2025, a gap of roughly a decade. Python, the primary language for this role, is absent from his skills entirely. There is no mention of RAG architectures, vector databases, LLM evaluation pipelines, or multi-agent frameworks (LangGraph, CrewAI), which are core technical requirements, not nice-to-haves.
strengths: Direct MCP (Model Context Protocol) server and agentic workflow infrastructure experience at re:cinq, matching a key technology in the JD
Proven large-scale data pipeline engineering at Dunnhumby handling millions of HTTP requests/second with low-latency, high-performance systems
Staff-level seniority track record with customer-facing and mentoring responsibilities across multiple organizations
concerns: Python is entirely absent from his listed skills and employment history — a hard requirement for this role
No demonstrated experience with RAG architectures, vector databases, or LLM evaluation/observability frameworks
AI/GenAI work is limited to one role started in April 2025, versus the required 8+ years of production AI solution development
